member.summary: Application entry point with dependency injection.

member.summary: Gets the current app instance.

member.name: P:Better11.App.App.Services
member.summary: Gets the service provider.

member.name: P:Better11.App.App.MainDispatcherQueue
member.summary: Gets the main dispatcher queue for UI thread access.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Better11.App.App.GetService``1
member.summary: Gets a service from the DI container.

member.name: M:Better11.App.App.ShowErrorDialog(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows an error dialog to the user.

member.name: M:Better11.App.App.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent()

member.name: T:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard
member.summary: A compact settings card with icon, title, description, and an action content slot. Used for dense settings/configuration rows throughout the Better11 UI.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.TitleProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the card title.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.DescriptionProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the card description.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.GlyphProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the icon glyph.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.ActionContentProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the action content (e.g., ToggleSwitch, Button, ComboBox).

member.name: M:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the card title.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the card description.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.Glyph
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon glyph character.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.ActionContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the action content (ToggleSwitch, Button, ComboBox, etc.).

member.name: M:Better11.App.Controls.CompactSettingsCard.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent()

member.name: T:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel
member.summary: A console-style output panel with monospace text, auto-scroll, copy, and clear functionality. Used throughout Better11 to display PowerShell command output.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.TitleProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the console title.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.OutputProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the output text content.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.StatusProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the status text.

member.name: M:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the console panel title.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.Output
member.summary: Gets or sets the output text content.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the status bar text.

member.name: M:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.AppendLine(System.String)
member.summary: Appends a line to the output and auto-scrolls to the bottom.

member.name: M:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.ClearOutput
member.summary: Clears all output text.

member.name: M:Better11.App.Controls.ConsoleOutputPanel.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent()

member.name: T:Better11.App.Controls.DenseCheckboxGrid
member.summary: A dense checkbox grid control for displaying toggleable items in a compact grid layout. Inspired by WinUtil's checkbox-heavy interface for system tweaks.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.DenseCheckboxGrid.HeaderProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the section header text.

member.name: F:Better11.App.Controls.DenseCheckboxGrid.ItemsSourceProperty
member.summary: Dependency property for the items source.

member.name: M:Better11.App.Controls.DenseCheckboxGrid.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.DenseCheckboxGrid.Header
member.summary: Gets or sets the section header text.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Controls.DenseCheckboxGrid.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the items source.

member.name: M:Better11.App.Controls.DenseCheckboxGrid.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent()

member.name: T:Better11.App.Converters.BoolToVisibilityConverter
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to a value.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Converters.BoolToVisibilityConverter.IsInverted
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the conversion is inverted. When true, false maps to Visible and true maps to Collapsed.

member.name: T:Better11.App.Converters.CountToVisibilityConverter
member.summary: Converts a numeric count to . Visible when count > 0, Collapsed when 0.

member.name: P:Better11.App.Converters.CountToVisibilityConverter.IsInverted
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the conversion is inverted. When true, 0 maps to Visible and non-zero maps to Collapsed.

member.name: T:Better11.App.Converters.SeverityToColorConverter
member.summary: Converts severity level strings to corresponding theme colors. Supports: Success, Warning, Error, Info, Critical.

member.name: T:Better11.App.Converters.StringNotEmptyToVisibilityConverter
member.summary: Converts a string to . Visible when non-empty, Collapsed when null or empty.

member.name: T:Better11.App.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Registers all Better11 services, ViewModels, and navigation.

member.name: M:Better11.App.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBetter11(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds all Better11 dependencies.

member.name: T:Better11.App.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering all Better11 services and ViewModels in the DI container.

member.name: M:Better11.App.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBetter11Services(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers all Better11 services, ViewModels, navigation, and settings into the .
member.param: The service collection to add registrations to.

member.name: T:WinRT.RcwFallbackInitializer
member.summary: Roots RCW types for assemblies referencing old projections. It is recommended to update those, to get binary size savings.

member.name: M:WinRT.RcwFallbackInitializer.InitializeRcwFallback
member.summary: Roots all dependent RCW types.
